commands: test -L $VP_HOME/bin/npm-global-uninstall-cli && echo 'link exists' # Link should exist after install
npm uninstall -g npm-global-uninstall-pkg # Uninstall should remove the link
test -L $VP_HOME/bin/npm-global-uninstall-cli && echo 'link exists' || echo 'link removed' # Link should be gone
